zh.Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry於大約1515年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利時，他的父親Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry29歲，母親Margaret MacDonald27歲。他於大約1543年與Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年4月在蘇格蘭乃爾史爾乃爾享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Scottish Gaelic name Aonghas . Though still having a Scottish flavour, it has been used increasingly in modern times also by people without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Aonghas
meanings: Pronounced ‘een-yis’; from Celtic words meaning ‘one’ and ‘choice’. This is the name of an ancient Celtic god, and is first recorded as a personal name in Adomnan's ‘Life of St Columba’, where it occurs in the form Oinogus(s)ius as the name of a man for whom the saint prophesied a long life and a peaceful death. This is also almost certainly the name of the 8th-century Pictish king variously recorded as Onnust and Hungus.

nameMeanings.name: MacAllister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish:  see  McAllister  .

variants.name: McAllister
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Alasdair ‘son of Alasdair’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Alexander .
History: MacAlister is the name of a Scottish Highland clan claiming descent from Alasdair Mòr Mac Dòmhnaill, a younger son of Domhnall mac Raghnaill, founder of Clan Donald (see McDonald ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry was born about 1515, in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry, was 29 and his mother, Margaret MacDonald, was 27. He married Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan about 1543, in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in April 1574, in Nairn, Nairnshire, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry est né environ 1515, à Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacDonald, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan environ 1543, à Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1574, à Nairn, Nairnshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

Er hat um 1543 in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1574 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Nairn, Nairnshire, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarryが約1515年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリーで生まれた時，父Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarryは29歳，母Margaret MacDonaldは27歳であった。約1543年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリーでLady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunveganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年4月にスコットランドナイルンシュアイアナイルンで60歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(이)가 대략 1515년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌가리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret MacDonald(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1543년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌가리에서 Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 4월 스컷랜드 나른실르 나른에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret MacDonald, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan aproximadamente 1543, em Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1574, em Nairn, Nairnshire, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry родился около 1515 г. в местности гленгарри, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Allister MacDonald 6th of Glengarry было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacDonald, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan около 1543 г. в местности гленгарри, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1574 г. в местности неирн, неирншир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan aproximadamente 1543, en Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
